_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: Nf1+/− mice treated with 0.01mg/Kg picrotoxin searched significantly longer in the training quadrant than Nf1+/− mice treated with saline, and were indistinguishable from WT mice
details: Learning deficits were rescued by 0.01mg/Kg picrotoxin treatment - treated mice searched significantly longer in training quadrant and became indistinguishable from WT mice
